Looks reasonable. Was this causing the llog record size to be increased on the MDS or similar?  I recall that Isaac had increased the block size for directories as well to increase performance.

parents.subject: LU-7728 osp: soft lockup in osp_precreate_reserve()

commit.subject: LU-7906 osd: no blocksize on non-OST objects
commit.message:
LU-7906 osd: no blocksize on non-OST objects

osd-zfs should not set blocksize on non-OST objects.

Change-Id: Idafe2236a49ffcb86bf06971d3687c8fceb516a2
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/19286
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nathaniel.l.clark@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
